zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Hilton於1488年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William Hilton38歲，母親Margery Bowes45歲。他於大約1510年與Sibill Lumley結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1513年登記服兵役。他去世於1537年在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾森德藍德享年49歲，埋葬在葡萄牙亞速爾群島奧 米格爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Hilton was born in 1488, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Hilton, was 38 and his mother, Margery Bowes, was 45. He married Sibill Lumley about 1510. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1513. He died in 1537, in Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in São Miguel, Azores, Portugal.

fr.Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, England: Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Hilton est né en 1488, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Hilton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margery Bowes, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Sibill Lumley environ 1510. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1513. Il est décédé en 1537, à Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à São Miguel, Açores, Portugal.

de.Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, England: Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Hilton 1488 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Hilton 38 und seine Mutter Margery Bowes 45. Er hat um 1510 Sibill Lumley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1513 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1537 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom und wurde in São Miguel, Azoren, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hilton è nato il nel 1488 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Hilton, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margery Bowes, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Sibill Lumley circa 1510. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1513. Morì nel 1537, nel Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a São Miguel, Azzorre, Portogallo.

ko.Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, England: 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 선델랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Hilton(이)가 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hilton(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Bowes(은)는 45세였다. 그는 대략 1510년 Sibill Lumley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1537년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 선델랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 아조 레스 스a오 미구얼에 묻혔다.

pt.Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, England: Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hilton nasceu em 1488, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Hilton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margery Bowes, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibill Lumley aproximadamente 1510. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1513. Ele faleceu em 1537, em Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em São Miguel, Açores, Portugal.

ru.Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, England: сундирланд, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Hilton родился в 1488 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Hilton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Bowes, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibill Lumley около 1510 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1513 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1537 г. в местности сундирланд, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности сaо мигуел, Азорские острова, Португалия.

Murió en 1537, en Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en São Miguel, Açores, Portugal.
